summary: Tested 2 features: Password toggle on login page and Document Upload in Concierge Panel. Both features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ConciergeHomePanel.jsx line 211: Console warning 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - minor React warning in ConciergeHomePanel render

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Both password toggle and document upload working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Password toggle on login page uses data-testid='toggle-password-visibility' and toggles input type between 'password' and 'text'. Document upload in Concierge panel requires: 1) Navigate to /mira-demo, 2) Click CONCIERGE tab (data-testid='os-tab-concierge'), 3) Click 'Upload Docs' chip (data-testid='upload-document-chip'), 4) Upload files via file input (data-testid='file-input'). Upload API at POST /api/mira/upload/file accepts multipart form with file, pet_id, and context fields.

features_verified.password_toggle_shows_password: PASS - Clicking toggle changes type to 'text'
features_verified.password_toggle_hides_password: PASS - Clicking toggle again changes type back to 'password'
features_verified.concierge_panel_opens: PASS - Clicking CONCIERGE tab opens ConciergeHomePanel
features_verified.upload_docs_chip_visible: PASS - 'Upload Docs' chip is present and clickable
features_verified.dropzone_visible: PASS - Drag-drop zone visible with 'Drop files here or browse'
features_verified.file_upload_api: PASS - Backend API /api/mira/upload/file working (4/4 tests passed)
features_verified.file_upload_ui: PASS - Uploaded file appears in list with success indicator
